items.title: ReLU and variants
items.description: ReLU hard-zeros negatives with a kink at zero; GELU smoothly damps negatives via the Gaussian CDF and is the common Transformer alternative to ReLU in FFN blocks.

items.title: Multi-head attention stacks
items.description: Each Transformer layer pairs attention with an FFN sublayer; GELU is the typical non-linearity inside that FFN after the up-projection.

items.title: Hugging Face Transformers
items.description: Many `AutoModel` checkpoints (BERT, RoBERTa, GPT-2) ship with GELU in config-driven MLP modules—matching the activation is required for correct fine-tuning.

items.title: Gaussian CDF intuition
items.description: GELU's definition uses Φ(x), the standard normal CDF; understanding that curve explains why large positives pass through and negatives are softly suppressed.
